personalizedSubjectLine: Outreach: Pitching Health eRecords to OMADA HEALTH IPO
personalizedPitchEmail:
Hi Selection,

Given your investment in App and your focus on HealthTech, I wanted to share what we are building.

We have launched Health eRecords, a specialized solution designed for the HealthTech space. A HIPAA-compliant Electronic Health Records (EHR) platform for private medical practices. It automates patient intake, streamlines charting, integrates medical billing, and connects to labs via HL7 APIs, saving doctors 10+ hours of admin work per week.

We are currently raising our Seed round to accelerate product development and expand our customer base.

Would you be open to a quick 10-minute call next week to see if there is alignment with your current investment thesis?
personalizedProposal:
Proposal Pitch for Health eRecords:
- Problem: Administrative friction and operational inefficiencies in the HealthTech sector.
- Solution: Health eRecords automates clinical/business workflows, saving users valuable hours every week.
- Market: Pitching to early-stage investors for Seed funding to capture market share.
